headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 24, 2026**
article:
The MLB season continues to heat up with thrilling matchups and key roster moves. Here's a rundown of the top news from around the league.

Top News:
The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts. The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, securing a 10-3 victory behind Adley Rutschman's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 win over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez hitting two home runs and driving in four runs.

Injuries and Availability Impact:
Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Caleb Thielbar (left hamstring strain), Tampa Bay Rays right-handed pitcher Edwin Uceta (right shoulder impingement), and New York Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor (left calf strain).

Roster Movement:
The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash. The Chicago Cubs have traded for third baseman Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded right-handed pitcher Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-handed pitcher Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Tigers in Thrilling 9-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Orioles Rout Red Sox 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, securing a 10-3 victory. Adley Rutschman led the Orioles' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling 8-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 win over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the charge at the plate. Martínez hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Tommy Nance earned a strong relief appearance with three strikeouts in one inning.

top_news.title: Rockies Edge Mets in Thrilling 4-3 Victory
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a narrow win over the New York Mets, with Michael Lorenzen earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Thielbar Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Caleb Thielbar has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
